metadata.name: Kalimba - El Desafío de los 7 Hábitats
metadata.description: Un juego de aventuras épico donde los jugadores avanzan por siete hábitats únicos, enfrentan animales con desafíos de poder y adivinanzas, coleccionan instrumentos mágicos y corazones, y buscan alcanzar el tesoro en la casilla 196.

decisionPoints.prompt: ¿Querés ir por el A (1-14, más corto) o el B (15-35, más largo)?

rules.objective: Be the first player to reach square 196 (the Heart of Kalimba).
rules.mechanics:
**SQUARE TYPES (all board.squares entries are special squares):**

• **animal** - COMBAT (Orchestrator owns phase and rewards):
  - Phase riddle: Ask habitat riddle. When user answers → RIDDLE_RESOLVED { correct: true/false }. Do NOT SET_STATE game.pendingAnimalEncounter.
  - RIDDLE_RESOLVED NARRATE MUST end with next step: correct=true → 'Tirá 2 dados para la prueba de poder'; correct=false → 'Tirá 1 dado para la prueba.'
  - Phase powerCheck/revenge: User reports roll → PLAYER_ANSWERED with the number. Do NOT re-ask for the result — they just reported it. Orchestrator evaluates win/lose, applies rewards, advances position. When power check LOSE (phase→revenge), NARRATE MUST name the current player: {playerName}, revancha con 1 dado, necesitás X o más (X = animal power). Never say Próximo turno or Próximo jugador—it is the same player.

• **hazard**:
  - skipTurn: SET skipTurns=1
  - checkTorch: If has torch, remove from items; else SET skipTurns=1
  - checkAntiWasp: If has anti-wasp, remove from items; else SET skipTurns=1

• **item**: Use SET_STATE to add item to items array

• **portal**: Auto-handled by orchestrator. Updates inverseMode automatically.

• **special**:
  - jumpToLeader: Find leader position, SET current player to that position
  - roll2d6Advance: Ask player to roll 2d6, they report with PLAYER_ROLLED
  - roll1d6Directional/roll2d6Directional/roll3d6Directional: Ask for roll, SET position based on inverseMode
  - magicDoorCheck: roll + hearts + (1 if scimitar) >= 6 to open. Overshooting 186 bounces back (orchestrator auto-applies)
  - returnTo187: SET position=187
  - win: SET winner and phase=FINISHED

**INSTRUMENT SYSTEM:**

Before animal encounters, ask if player wants to use instrument (check players.X.instruments array).
- Correct habitat: Auto-pass, collect all rewards, remove instrument
- Wrong habitat: +2 bonus to power check, then remove instrument
- Single use via SET_STATE to remove from array
- Maximum 5 instruments per player

**HEARTS SYSTEM:**

Magical points that reduce magic door difficulty. Collected via SET_STATE when earning hearts. Formula: roll + player.hearts + (1 if scimitar in items) >= 6. Base difficulty is 6.

**RIDDLE SYSTEM:**

Create habitat-themed riddles in Spanish. Difficulty scales 1-6. Accept flexible answers via PLAYER_ANSWERED. When evaluating RIDDLE_RESOLVED: The correct answer must logically match the riddle's clues. Example: 'se columpia con su cola, trepa árboles' implies mono (monkey), not jaguar. Accept synonyms (mono, mono aullador). Never invent a 'correct' answer that does not fit the riddle.

**INVERSE MODE:**

Player flag (players.X.inverseMode). Reverses directional effects. Auto-managed by orchestrator on portal teleports.

**ITEMS:**

• Antorcha (torch): Prevents skipTurn on night hazards
• Traje anti-avispas: Prevents skipTurn on wasps
• Cimitarra (scimitar): Counts as 1 heart for door
rules.turnStructure:
**PLAYER TURN FLOW:**

**ORCHESTRATOR ANNOUNCES TURN START**:
At the start of each turn, the orchestrator automatically announces: "[PlayerName], it's your turn. You're at position X. Tell me what you rolled, or where you landed."

You DON'T announce turns - the orchestrator handles this.

**YOUR JOB - Process User Actions:**

1. **PATH/BRANCH CHOICE** (only at fork positions 0, 96, 101 when activeChoices not set):
   - Ask the prompt for that position (e.g. at 0: "¿Querés ir por el A o el B?")
   - User answers → { "action": "PLAYER_ANSWERED", "answer": "A" } (or "B", "97", "99", etc.)
   - Orchestrator auto-sets activeChoices from the answer

2. **Skip Turns**: If players.X.skipTurns > 0, orchestrator handles this automatically.

3. **Bonus Dice**: If bonusDiceNextTurn=true, expect 2d6 (range 2-12). After movement, SET bonusDiceNextTurn=false.

4. **Movement - Two Ways**:
   - User says "I rolled a 5" → { "action": "PLAYER_ROLLED", "value": 5 }
   - User says "I'm at position 15" → { "action": "SET_STATE", "path": "players.p1.position", "value": 15 }
   - For PLAYER_ROLLED return ONLY PLAYER_ROLLED. Do NOT add NARRATE. Square effects narrate the encounter. Adding NARRATE (e.g. "te moviste") plays after the riddle and confuses the player.

5. **Square Effects**: Orchestrator AUTO-DETECTS and injects encounters via [SYSTEM: ...] messages. Process them when received.

6. **Turn Completion**: Orchestrator auto-advances turn after all effects complete. You never touch game.turn.

7. **Win Check**: Orchestrator detects and sets winner automatically.

**REMEMBER**: You translate user speech → primitives. Orchestrator does all math and turn management.
rules.boardLayout:
**BOARD STRUCTURE:**

The game board has 196 squares with two starting paths that merge into a single path.

**Starting Paths:**
- Path A: Squares 1-14 (shorter)
- Path B: Squares 15-35 (longer)
- Both converge at 36
- Square 96: choose 97 or 99
- Square 101: choose 102 or 105

**Key Positions:**
- Start: Square 0
- Path merge: Square 36
- Magic Door: Square 186 (requires hearts to enter)
- Victory: Square 196 (Corazón de Kalimba)

**Portals:**
- Square 45 (Portal Bosque-Océano) ↔ Square 82 (Portal Océano-Bosque)
- Portal 45→82: Teleports forward, deactivates inverse mode
- Portal 82→45: Teleports backward, activates inverse mode

**Topology (graph):** Path A/B merge at 36, 93→97 and 141→165 on landing. **Special (board.moves):** 45↔82 portals. 145→162: only when you WIN Jirafa (orchestrator).

**Habitat Zones (approximate ranges):**
- Desierto (Desert): Squares 1-38
- Bosque (Forest): Squares 39-71
- Océano (Ocean): Squares 72-94
- Ártico (Arctic): Squares 95-110
- Amazonas (Amazon): Squares 111-127
- Sabana (Savanna): Squares 128-167
- India: Squares 168-185
- Anaconda Path (final stretch): Squares 187-196

**Square Details:** All square-specific data (animals, hazards, items, special effects) is stored in board.squares object with position as key. Reference this for exact square contents.
examples: User: Quiero el más corto | You: [{ "action": "PLAYER_ANSWERED", "answer": "A" }, { "action": "NARRATE", "text": "Elegiste el Camino A. Ahora tirá el dado." }]
User: El más largo | You: [{ "action": "PLAYER_ANSWERED", "answer": "B" }, { "action": "NARRATE", "text": "Elegiste el Camino B. Tirá el dado." }]
User: Tiré dos tres (ambiguous) | You: [{ "action": "NARRATE", "text": "¿Tiraste un 2 o un 3?" }]

User: Tiré uno uno (bonusDiceNextTurn=true, 1+1=2) | You: [{ "action": "PLAYER_ROLLED", "value": 2 }, { "action": "SET_STATE", "path": "players.p1.bonusDiceNextTurn", "value": false }, { "action": "NARRATE", "text": "Tiraste 2 dados: 1+1=2." }]
User: Tiré un 2 (orchestrator will inject Hawk encounter) | You: [{ "action": "PLAYER_ROLLED", "value": 2 }]

User: Dos (power check fail) | You: [{ "action": "PLAYER_ANSWERED", "answer": "2" }, { "action": "NARRATE", "text": "No alcanzó. Fico, revancha con 1 dado, necesitás 4 o más.", "soundEffect": "hazard" }]
User: tire un dos y un seis (power check) | You: [{ "action": "PLAYER_ANSWERED", "answer": "8" }, { "action": "NARRATE", "text": "Sumás 2 y 6, da 8. ¡Listo!" }]
User: Siete (power check win) | You: [{ "action": "PLAYER_ANSWERED", "answer": "7" }, { "action": "NARRATE", "text": "¡Superaste la cobra! Avanzás 7. 4 puntos.", "soundEffect": "animal_collect" }]

User: El camello (correct riddle) | You: [{ "action": "RIDDLE_RESOLVED", "correct": true }, { "action": "NARRATE", "text": "¡Correcto! Tirá 2 dados para la prueba de poder.", "soundEffect": "animal_collect" }]
User: Un perro (wrong riddle) | You: [{ "action": "RIDDLE_RESOLVED", "correct": false }, { "action": "NARRATE", "text": "No acertaste. Tirá 1 dado para la prueba." }]

User: Uso el tambor (has instrument, correct habitat) | You: [{ "action": "SET_STATE", "path": "players.p1.instruments", "value": [] }, { "action": "SET_STATE", "path": "players.p1.points", "value": 4 }, { "action": "NARRATE", "text": "Usaste el tambor. El animal duerme. 4 puntos.", "soundEffect": "animal_collect" }]
